entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop Arachis hypogaea L. studied for early maturity inheritance

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: A trait of interest for developing short-duration cultivars in groundnut

entities.name: DAYS TO FIRST FLOWER FROM SOWING
entities.description: A component of early maturity measuring the time from sowing to the first flower

entities.name: DAYS TO ACCUMULATION OF 25 FLOWERS
entities.description: A component of early maturity measuring the time from the first flower to the 25th flower

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The method of crossing genotypes in all possible combinations, including reciprocals

entities.name: SINGLE GENE
entities.description: The genetic unit governing the days to first flower trait

entities.name: THREE INDEPENDENT GENES
entities.description: The genetic units controlling the days to accumulation of 25 flowers

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: The type of gene action associated with the single gene governing days to first flower

entities.name: COMPLETE DOMINANCE
entities.description: The genetic control mechanism at each locus for the days to accumulation of 25 flowers

entities.name: DOMINANT-RECESSIVE EPISTASIS
entities.description: The segregation pattern observed for days to accumulation of 25 flowers in crosses between late and early parents

relationships.description: is the crop for which early maturity is studied

relationships.target: DAYS TO FIRST FLOWER FROM SOWING
